name: ericboehs-claude-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins by Eric Boehs — session analysis, workflow automation, and developer productivity tools

plugins.name: session-improver
plugins.description: Analyze Claude Code sessions to find token waste, linter loops, and missing automations, then recommend and apply fixes

plugins.name: apple-reminders
plugins.description: Manage Apple Reminders from Claude Code using remindctl CLI

plugins.name: cli-email
plugins.description: CLI email management using himalaya, mbsync, and neomutt with local Maildir sync and search

plugins.name: apple-calendar
plugins.description: Manage Apple Calendar from Claude Code using ical CLI with full CRUD, search, and calendar filtering

plugins.name: slack
plugins.description: Slack messaging, status, and search using slk CLI (Slack Gem)

plugins.name: code-lint
plugins.description: Multi-language linting via PostToolUse hooks with per-project config and interactive setup wizard

plugins.name: git-utils
plugins.description: Git workflow utilities — merge PRs, clean up branches, and handle worktrees in one command

plugins.name: icloud-downloads
plugins.description: Copy files to iCloud Downloads for easy access on iPhone/iPad

plugins.name: gist
plugins.description: Create and update GitHub Gists with auto-generated README comments

plugins.name: unanet
plugins.description: Automate Unanet timesheet entry via Playwright and Okta SSO with 1Password credentials
